title: crotalaria ovalis
intro: Crotalaria ovalis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the oval leaf rattle pod due to its distinctive seed pods that rattle when dry. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria ovalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria ovalis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its seeds are sometimes crushed and used as a powder for topical applications.
